verification_commands: jq '{schema_version, policy, planner_name, gate, plan_rows, skipped_rows, plan_rows_by_request, direction_source_counts, output_forbidden_action_field_count, terminal_commit_rows, uses_gt_for_action, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_observation_plan_v1/goal_validity_object_relation_observation_plan_summary.json

jq '{rows, expected_rows, gate, projection_anchor_visible_rows, projection_anchor_visible_rate, missing_candidate_rows, frame_revision_metadata_rows, candidate_selection_source_counts, uses_gt_for_action, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_observation_projection_v1/projection_anchor_smoke_summary.json

jq '{associated_candidate_heading_count, candidate_association_rate, detector_box_rate, detector_rows, frame_rows, gate, rows_with_candidate_association, sam2_mask_rate, uses_gt_for_action, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_observation_detector_substrate_v1/expanded_retrieval_detector_substrate_summary.json

jq '{rows, rows_with_detector_box, rows_with_detector_box_rate, rows_with_sam2_mask, rows_with_sam2_mask_rate, rows_with_candidate_association, rows_with_candidate_association_rate, association_rows, associated_candidate_heading_count, detector_box_rows, detector_mask_rows, projected_pixel_inside_mask_count, projection_status_counts}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_observation_detector_substrate_v1/detector_v3c/summary.json

jq -s '{rows:length, associated_counts:(map(.associated_to_candidate|tostring) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add), depth_status:(map(.depth_check_status) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add), direction_sources:(map(.standoff_direction_source) | group_by(.) | map({(.[0]):length}) | add)}' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_object_relation_observation_detector_substrate_v1/detector_v3c/detector_candidate_associations.jsonl

interpretation.fact: The object-relation post-detector evidence contract is frozen from Docker-verified plan, projection, and detector substrate outputs.
interpretation.agent_inference: The next implementation should aggregate detector-depth evidence into nonterminal evidence/request rows, then report whether the relation-depth gap is resolved, partial, or still unresolved without committing to a goal.
